fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the segment was successfully extracted; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.start: The distance along the path at which the segment begins.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the extracted path segment.
params.startWithMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to begin the segment with a move-to, starting a new contour in the destination builder; <see langword="false" /> to append the segment to the current contour.
params.stop: The distance along the path at which the segment ends.

fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the path between the specified distances and appends it to the destination builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);
